summary: Frontend-only testing of redesigned Workspace UI - Found discrepancy between expected new design and current implementation

integration_issues.issue: Expected redesigned workspace components (PersistentProjectCard, ProjectDetailPanel, ProjectTimeline) are not visible/active in the current deployment

ui_bugs.issue: Click interception on mobile when sidebar is open - prevents clicking on main content

design_issues.issue: Current workspace shows old design instead of new persistent project layout with split view
design_issues.expected: Split view on desktop with projects left, detail panel right
design_issues.actual: Single column layout with traditional project cards

passed_tests: Prompt input accepts text and submit button is clickable
Project cards are visible and clickable
Project navigation to builder works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent:
CRITICAL: The redesigned workspace components (PersistentProjectCard with stats/tech stack, ProjectDetailPanel with timeline/quick continue, ProjectTimeline with build history, split view layout) are implemented in code but not visible in the deployed application. Need to verify:
1. Are these components being imported/used in the main Workspace.tsx?
2. Are there any feature flags or conditions preventing them from rendering?
3. Is the persistent project store properly connected and returning data?
4. The current workspace shows old design - need to activate the new redesigned components.
